evidence_scope.basis: Archived first-pass/no-retry outputs already frozen before repair scoring.

chart.source: results/nvbench-layer2-formal/summary.md, SkillGuidedAgent spec-only mean of viz/metric/dimension

caveats: This arm is direct archived evidence, not a fresh rerun. It is direct because the first-pass/no-retry outputs are committed as raw JSON and are not inferred from the repaired arm.

Layer-3 financial SkillGuided outputs were created as one-shot parent-controlled executions with no separate LLM repair loop archived; therefore their no-verify-repair values equal the full-system Layer-3 values.
The measured verify-repair effect is strongest and cleanest on Layer-1, where oracle-blind SQL Lab repair is explicitly separated from the first-pass output.
